text: This study aims to reveal and analyze the culture of Quran literacy in Amaliyah Sunggal Private Islamic Senior High School, as an effort to develop students' religious character. For that reason, the researcher used qualitative descriptive method which consists of observation, interviews and documentation studies. The analysis of data used in this study is data reduction, data presentation and drawing conclusion. To test the validity of the data, the researcher used triangulation method in order to increase the accuracy and reliability of the data. The results of the study showed that the culture of Quran literacy was very effective in developing students' religious character, so that students could carry out the teachings of Islam well, and behave accordingly, thus creating a sense of discipline, deep understanding of Islamic values, social feelings and strong religious identity. In addition, the study found that there were many obstacles that hindered the development of students' religious character. The obstacles were lack of interest among students, the lack of preparedness of teachers in handling the students, the heavy syllabus and also the negative impact of the surrounding society and modern society. Therefore, the solution to the obstacles found was the improvement of teacher competence, the way of using time effectively and the support of parents and cooperation from parents and the community.
